exchanges.expected: El mostrador de check-in está en el segundo piso.
exchanges.hint: The check-in counter is on the second floor.

exchanges.expected: Sí, aquí tiene mi pasaporte y mi boleto.
exchanges.hint: Yes, here is my passport and ticket.

exchanges.expected: El vuelo sale a las tres de la tarde.
exchanges.hint: The flight leaves at three in the afternoon.
I want to check two suitcases.

exchanges.expected: Prefiero un asiento de ventana, por favor.
exchanges.hint: I prefer a window seat, please.

exchanges.expected: Mi número de vuelo es el 402.
La puerta de embarque está por allá, a la derecha.
exchanges.hint: The boarding gate is over there, to the right.

exchanges.expected: No, gracias. Yo puedo cargar mi equipaje.
exchanges.hint: No, thanks. I can carry my luggage.
